script_text: Great readers are like detectives. They look for clues in a story.
They ask questions and hunt for answers in the words.
Let us learn some detective questions to ask!
Good detectives ask five big questions.
Bella picked three red apples from the tree. She put them in her basket.
Who is the story about? Bella!
What did she do? She picked apples.
How many apples? Three. We found the answer in the words!
When you finish reading, go back and find the answer in the words.
Now you are ready to practice answering story questions!
